title: Estimator
description: Deterministic effort estimation: work packages derived from the solution proposal, each with a per-role person-day range, aggregated into a role-based summary that feeds the proposal's price table. No external knowledge.

document_id.description: Optional ID of the source document.

work_packages.description: Work packages derived from the solution proposal's solution blocks, plus cross-cutting work packages not tied to a single block.

solution_block_id.description: Reference to the SB-xx solution block this work package belongs to. Omit for cross-cutting work packages (e.g. project management, QA, deployment) that are not tied to one block.

description.description: Short description of the work package's scope, in output_language.

addressed_requirements.description: FR/NFR IDs this work package helps deliver, carried over from the solution block if applicable.

effort_by_role.description: Per-role person-day range estimate for this work package.

role_title.description: Denormalised role title, in output_language, for readability.

person_days_min.description: Lower bound of the person-day estimate.

person_days_max.description: Upper bound of the person-day estimate.

rationale.description: Why this effort range for this role in this work package, in output_language.

role_summary.description: Person-day range per role, aggregated across all work_packages. Directly feeds the proposal's price table.

seniority.description: Seniority level, carried over from StaffingCatalogResult.json.

person_days_min.description: Aggregated lower bound across all work packages for this role.

person_days_max.description: Aggregated upper bound across all work packages for this role.

total_effort.description: Aggregated person-day range across all roles.

assumptions.description: Global assumptions underlying the estimate (e.g. travel costs, client-provided test data).

confidence.description: Overall confidence in the estimate, informed by the open research questions/risks in SolutionProposalResult.md.

errors.description: Error block for validation or processing errors.
